name: Expand MCP toolchain integration test coverage
objective: Expand integration tests so MCP tool registration, invocation contract shape, and branding-core export consistency are verified from a single maintained matrix.
exit_criteria: Integration tests assert the complete registered MCP tool set through a reusable registration path
Integration tests verify invocation contract shape for core and vertical MCP tools using table-driven fixtures
Integration tests assert tool-to-branding-core export consistency without changing release/version/publish flows
